core_skills: Full-Stack Development, Front-End Development, Back-End Development, AI Integration, AI Application Development
skill_match_scores: Full-Stack Development:0.0, Front-End Development:0.5, Back-End Development:1.0, AI Integration:1.0, AI Application Development:1.0
must_have_quals: Proven track record of building incredible products and thrive in environments where you're the primary decision-maker for your projects, Comfortable working across the entire stack, from front-end user interfaces to back-end services and AI integrations, Strongest on the front-end, but confident and willing to dive into back-end work when needed, Experience or strong interest in building with AI and a desire to gain more experience creating production applications using AI, Value shipping quickly and iterating based on real-world usage, Enjoy working collaboratively but are also highly effective when working independently
core_responsibilities: Develop Core Software: Build, ship, and maintain features that make up Eve’s core product, Drive Product Direction: Collaborate with the team to understand user needs, define new features, and decide on implementation strategies, Full-Stack Development: Own and scale the user-facing experience of Eve products, turning powerful capabilities into intuitive, magical interfaces, Collaborate with backend, ML, design, and product teams to bring complex features to life in a seamless way, AI Integration: Design and build AI-native solutions that power and streamline every aspect of law firm operations, creating tools that transform how legal work gets done, Rapid Deployment: Embrace a fast shipping cadence, continuously iterating based on user feedback, Work with Customers: You work with customers directly to solve their problems - innovate and iterate
job_summary: Eve is redefining legal technology for plaintiff law firms, and they are seeking a Product Engineer to join their innovative team. In this role, you will be responsible for developing core software, driving product direction, and building AI-native solutions to streamline legal operations while collaborating closely with customers and internal teams.
